reviews.review_title: Please make a better server system
reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game but the servers are awful, I either connect to a lobby with nobody or only a few people, and as much as I love this game we need codes or a server system similar to something like Orion Drift (a list of servers that you can see the population of and choose to go to)

Other than that I love this game and I'm sure I'll keep loving this game as they add more game modes but before that PLEASE fix the servers
Hi this is a good game

reviews.review_title: the BEST Squid Game VR experience rn
reviews.review_description: As it stands, Octo Games is the best attempt of a Squid Game VR Game, EVER. The unbridled fun that generates from this title is INSANE. Whenever you get into a round, you’ll have 30 seconds before the game starts. On the board, it says: (0 pearls, 0 per player). You see, whoever dies in the round adds to the prizepool like the actual Squid Game (this is also THE FIRST game I’ve seen where it tried to replicate that aspect of the game).  There are currently 4 games that can be chosen, and 2-3 are in each match. The games are: Red Light Green Light, Glass Bridge, Mingle, and The Grand Finale, Russian Roulette (it can be picked before the final game, but it’s a guarantee). RLGL goes how you would expect, but all the other games are amazing. Mingle is the #1 reason for screaming in this game, and Russian Roulette is the best game mode, especially as a finale. 5 full stars, you won’t regret playing this game

THEY REMOVED IT
I was gonna play with my friend but he can’t download it

Overall pretty good for its first release, there are only a few bugs surprisingly. Although considering they are pretty experienced at making games (Untangled) I'm not as surprised that there are fewer bugs, apart from those bugs its a great game! If you haven't got it yet, get it, its Free! Also join their discord.

1. It doesn’t let you in a lobby and just says loading.
2. It makes it unfair in red light green light: if somebody dies they can still push other players.
3. It is really buggy and doesn’t work.
DONT GET THIS GAME IF YOU WANT TO HAVE FUN

Ok real quick grab up a few good friends now this is exactly what I helped for and for a squid game in VR. This game is so great. I love it so much especially playing it with all the random people and my friends. We all have such a fun time together and it makes a squid game, perfect the betrayal of the death in the teambuilding experience is exactly what we needed for a squid game the game however the game is still kind of buggy, but that’s how all game start off great game and continue to update and add more games into it. I can’t wait to play them. ￼

The gamemodes are fun but its impossible to get in a server. Worst servers ever, and ghosts can push. So many times ive died on red light green light and mingle and glass bridge because of ghosts, and buggy as hell. Russian roulette glitches on first round, if u have less than 5 people at last game nobody wins, and whole game glitches if anybody leaves.

This is got to be the one of the best squid games vr games out there. Trust me there is nothing more terrifying than 20 people getting in one room and mingle yelling at the top of their lungs. 

You did a good job can’t wait to see future updates :D

Thanks you

I love this game, it’s genuinely really fun however I have a few complaints:
1. There as so many toxic and overall bad people in this game (I know you can’t rlly fix this but still)
2. The prize, it’s near impossible to actually earn your prize because people join a new lobby when they die so at the end when there needs to be 5 people, there will only be 1-2
3. The bugs and lags 
As I stated before I absolutely love this game but I’d really like to see some things improved.
(Could I also get a link for the discord here? I can’t access the one on TikTok)

reviews.review_title: It's fun, but servers are super broken
reviews.review_description:
This game is super fun but there's literally nobody online even on the weekends. It's sad cause the game is so fun

Edit:I don't think the player counts is low but I think the servers are just super broken cause sometimes I join lobbies that are full but then sometimes I join lobbies where the counter doesn't start and where nobody joins. Fix your servers

It's fun and I love playing the games and making gangs too, but getting into a lobby with people is extremely hard. I find myself constantly rejoining, just to be put in a broken server with a broken teleporter. If that issue was fixed, I would rate 5 stars. Still a fun game though

All while the game is fun when it does not bug, it just has too many glitches. 
First of all sometimes in glass bridge it spawns me off of the platform and kills me. Other times it just straight up spawns me out of the map it Red light Green light. 
Another thing is that when you win, sometimes it just says,”Waiting for players” and does not give you the pearls that you won fair and square. I should be 45,000 pearls richer because of this.
Once in mingle I became stuck in the carousel and ended up dying.
Not to mention, in glass bridge, you can stick your hand through one of the pillars and elevator climb your way through the map.
I get that the game is in early access but you could have waited to release the game and fix the bugs first.

I love this game and enjoy pushing kids of the glass bridge but my main concern is that sometimes after a game/match it teleports me back to the lobby and it’s just me alone and the timer is just stuck at a certain number. Even when I restart my game the glitch just happens. It kinda comes back randomly.
